gates.name: garden-config-validate
gates.output: plain-text stdout on success and path-prefixed validation messages on stderr on failure
signature_families: expected one of none, explicit, children, markers
absolute and UNC paths are not allowed
parent path segments are not allowed
path resolves outside the project root
repeated adjacent ** segments are not allowed

gates.name: garden-inspect-strict
gates.output: JSON object with schema_version 2, scope, active, complete, coverage, exceptions, findings (rule_id/runtime_alias/level/severity/state/path/message plus a legacy rule alias), and summary fields
gates.success: exit 0, active true, and zero error-severity findings

gates.name: validate-docs
gates.success: exit 0 and 'documentation validation passed' on stdout
signature_families: defined rule ID is not referenced in checklist
owner must be a non-empty string

gates.name: validate-evidence
gates.output: path:line: reason findings and orphan-claim warnings on stderr
signature_families: is not listed in the registry Used by section
Used by path does not cite the claim
bare percentage without a CLAIM-N reference in the paragraph
relative Markdown link escapes the repository

gates.name: validate-package
gates.output: plain-text pass or package validation failure reason
gates.success: exit 0 and 'package validation passed' on stdout

gates.name: plugin-version-check
gates.output: base and current SemVer values on success or a validation exception on failure
gates.success: exit 0 and 'plugin version check passed:' on stdout

gates.name: sync-references-check
gates.success: exit 0 and 'reference copies are in sync' on stdout
